info.title: Librarian API
info.description: Local-first API for EPUB ingestion, local embedding maintenance, vector search, and library inspection.

tags.name: ingestion
tags.description: EPUB ingestion and ingestion database inspection.

tags.name: retrieval
tags.description: Vector search over stored chunk embeddings.

tags.name: chat
tags.description: Grounded answer synthesis over retrieved chunks.

tags.name: summaries
tags.description: On-demand chapter and book summarization workflows.

tags.name: metadata
tags.description: Generated book-level metadata such as genres.

value.name: Librarian
value.message: Local-first EPUB RAG workspace is ready.

post.description: Scans EPUB files, parses text, chunks books, stores book and chunk rows, optionally generates embeddings, and can enqueue asynchronous summary jobs for newly ingested books.

200.description: Counts and status totals for the ingestion database.

get.description: Returns UI-oriented progress for chunking, summarizing, and tagging so clients can poll while ingestion-related background work runs.

post.description: Regenerates embeddings from existing chunk rows without deleting books, chunks, or raw text.

benchmarkModel.summary: Clear all embeddings before benchmarking a model

post.description: Creates an embedding vector for direct inspection or for clients that need query vectors separately from search.
Embeds a user query, loads stored chunk embeddings for the same provider/model, scores them with cosine similarity, and returns ranked chunks with book metadata.

default.summary: Search with the default local model

value.query: what does the author say about memory?

authorFiltered.summary: Search within books by one author

value.query: How brutal and terrible is war?
value.author: Erich Maria Remarque

post.summary: Answer a question from local books
post.description: Retrieves relevant chunks, sends them to the configured local generator, and returns a grounded answer with source chunks.

ollama.summary: Ask with Ollama retrieval and generation

value.question: How brutal and terrible is war?
value.book_title: All Quiet on the Western Front

200.description: Grounded generated answer and the source chunks used as context.

post.description: Generates or reuses chapter-level summaries, then synthesizes a book-level summary. Summaries are generated on demand and can be reset for provider/model benchmarking.

parameters.name: book_id
parameters.description: Exact stored book id to summarize.

200.description: Generated or cached book summary with optional chapter summaries.

post.summary: Generate genres for one ingested book
post.description: Generates or reuses broad bookstore/library genres from an existing stored book summary.

parameters.name: book_id
parameters.description: Exact stored book id to classify.

get.summary: List stored genres for one book

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Filter by genre source, such as llm.

200.description: Stored genre records for the book.

delete.summary: Delete stored genres for one book

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by book ingestion status, such as ingested, duplicate, or failed.

200.description: Stored book records with ingestion status and chunk counts.

DatabaseUrl.name: database_url
DatabaseUrl.description: Storage URL to inspect or operate on. Defaults to LIBRARIAN_DATABASE_URL.

BadRequest.description: Invalid input, unsupported provider/database URL, missing EPUB source, or local embedding service failure.

ValidationError.description: Request body or query parameters failed FastAPI/Pydantic validation.

message.example: Local-first EPUB RAG workspace is ready.

books_dir.description: EPUB source directory. Defaults to LIBRARIAN_BOOKS_DIR.

list_epubs.description: Include discovered EPUB metadata in the response.

embed_chunks.description: Generate embeddings for chunks created during this ingestion run.

enqueue_summaries.description: Queue asynchronous chapter/book summary jobs for newly ingested books.

job_type.description: Background job type when this is metadata work, such as tags or genres.

query.description: User search/query text. Must not be empty.
User search/query text. Must not be empty.

book_id.description: Restrict search to one exact stored book id.

book_title.description: Restrict search to stored books whose title contains this text.

author.description: Restrict search to stored books whose author metadata contains this text.

SearchFilters.description: Active metadata filters applied before vector scoring.

book_title.description: Optional title filter used for validation/logging when selecting a book.

author.description: Optional author filter used for validation/logging when selecting a book.

max_section_chars.description: Maximum source characters to send in one section summary prompt.

reset.description: Delete matching summaries before regenerating them.

chunk_summary_timeout_seconds.description: Timeout in seconds for each Codex chunk/chapter summary call. Does not apply to final book summary synthesis.

max_parallel_chunk_summaries.description: Maximum number of chunk/chapter summaries to generate concurrently.

source_summary_provider.description: Provider for the stored book summary used as genre source.

source_summary_model.description: Model for the stored book summary used as genre source.

reset.description: Delete matching generated genres before regenerating them.

question.description: User question to answer from local source chunks.

book_id.description: Restrict retrieval to one exact stored book id.

book_title.description: Restrict retrieval to stored books whose title contains this text.

author.description: Restrict retrieval to stored books whose author metadata contains this text.
